Easy access to major highways and 3 Commuter rail stations - Sharon, Canton and Stoughton.  Excellent neighbors, very safe and quiet family-friendly community. One Webster, located in Chelsea, Massachusetts, is the epitome of luxury apartment living, offering studios, one, and two-bedroom apartment homes. Our community is conveniently situated just minutes from the best dining, shopping and nightlife that Boston has to offer. We are a sister city to Boston, being just ten minutes away, so if you are looking for apartments near Boston, we are a perfect choice!     Centrally Located   One Webster is located between Route 1A and Route 1 North.  We are near the intersection of Eastern Avenue and Webster Avenue, running just off Broadway.  We are centrally located with easy access to all major routes leading to Boston, New Hampshire, Cape Cod, Maine, and the beaches. We are two miles away from the Mystic Mall and the Marina at Admirals Hills is also a short ride away.   Our Walkscore is rated 76, which means most errands can be accomplished on foot and there are many nearby transportation options. The Silver Line 3 is just one block away and within walking distance from One Webster.   The station nearest our Chelsea apartments is the Eastern Avenue Station.    Schools Nearby   Our community is right across the street from Frank M. Sokolowski Elementary School.  There are several other elementary, middle, and high schools in the area. Bunker Hill Community College is within a 15-minute commute.   Community and Apartment Amenities   At One Webster, each of our residents receives VIP treatment with access to our 24-hour fitness center, Wi-Fi lounge, and resort-style pool.  In addition, we have an onsite childcare facility available for families. Our one and two-bedroom floorplan Chelsea apartment homes are fully equipped with every modern convenience, including hardwood floors, sprawling walk-in closets (in select units), gourmet style kitchens, and granite countertops.   Floorplans   We have studios, one, and two-bedroom apartment homes. The floorplans range in size between 590 square feet and 970 square feet.  The building has a parking garage in which you can reserve a space at an additional monthly fee. Through now many years of ownership, we have almost always managed to get long-term, high-quality, good-neighbor tenants - courteous and respectful of the privacy of others .... and who often stay for a long time. We've had weddings, births and, sadly, funerals over the years of ownership.  The classics are the tenants who came as toddlers and left went they went to college - one of whom actually came back after graduation to rent on her own behalf a few years later.    There is a good reason for that!  It doesn't just happen.  We treat our tenants with courtesy; take very good care of the place;  and with good-neighbors, the building is quiet.   In a word, this is just a really nice place to live.  If all this would work for YOU and you would also be a good neighbor (very important!), contact us.  What happens between current leaving and your moving in? As is our standard practice before anyone moves in, when current three-year occupant relocates, whole place repainted - walls, ceilings and trim - made sparkling clean and any necessary repairs done.  In short we will be in absolute move-in condition for our next resident.  Is that you?!?  We would suit well the needs of â¢  someone transferring into area from out-of-state â¢  a young family - place is lead-free â¢  professionals who need/could make good use of second bedroom as an in-unit office. â¢  room-mates sharing to keep ridiculously high cost of apartments in a range they can afford.   Utilities not included but incurred costs are very reasonable - heat and hot water are gas fired and run about $750-850 total per year... and No! that is not a typo. You are encouraged to check this statement with National Grid.  The place is packed with insulation (walls and ceilings), triple pane high-quality windows have a high R factor, and our equipment is top of the line.   WHAT will it COST to MOVE-IN?  â¢  ONE months rent  â¢  and $1000.00 Security  Since this place is privately owned and entirely owner-managed, move-in costs (by careful design) are lot less than most places. â¢  Of course, there are NO FEEs: application or signing. We do all our own rentals â¢  We do require a $1000 Security deposit paid once your application is accepted. â¢  First Month's rent (pro-rated if appropriate) will be due at time of occupancy when the lease is signed â¢  Also, most tenants opt for our Last Month's Account system under which they can pay over time towards that obligation   We understand very clearly that at today's prices, re-location can be (is) seriously expensive.  The requirement by many places for first, last and security means .... you're talking big money. The sign-up and move-in arrangements we have in place really help  â¢  to keep down the up-front cash requirements to get a new home  â¢  and are a much better fit to the cash flow of most people.  It works well for us and our tenants like it too.  Polite pets okay: ... and of course, don't let's forget your four-legged friends and other pets.  If they're well behaved and can be trusted to obey the house rules, they're welcome too. We have no dog-breed restrictions .... but we do need to meet your furry roommate.  About Revere: Revere is an older city with a long history and a mixed population by heritage, ethnicity and economic status. Many are people who would never live anywhere else. Those who have moved away are now moving back.  Importantly, in recent years there has been -- and continues to be -- major residential construction in the city ... especially along the oceanfront. These much higher-priced places are bringing a whole population of new residents to Revere who are finding this comparatively reasonably-priced city with -- such ready access to the City -- is a very good place to live as an alternative to the often small square footage and sky-high prices of metro Boston.   In response, City management has been majorly improved.   â¢  Quality local services â¢  Excellent school systems â¢  A range of public amenities - especially along the beach: summer-time movies and concerts, fireworks, the increasingly famous Sand Sculpture competition etc  Offering many of same attributes as the new places (being) built in Revere along the water, we are  â¢  far more reasonably priced â¢  a good buy for the budget-minded  â¢  provide an alternative to the somewhat sterile uniformity of new construction â¢  with on-street, residents-only parking â¢  and many of the major stores now having facilities nearby  .. and, of course, the ocean and spectacular beaches - longest stretch of public beach in United States and a National Park - are a big bonus to living in the City. Walks along the beach and seafront, sitting on the seawall or just looking up the coast from your living room or deck can be liberating, regenerating and really 'feed the soul'.  Imagine the pleasure every day of being able just to look out of the window to a view that is never the same - a 'living mural' as one tenant put it!!  All that - and yet you are within a short distance of Boston at a fraction of Metro-prices. Two T stops are within 3-5 minutes walk of the building -- and if you really must drive, the trip to the tunnels is only a few minutes OR you can head to 128 or north just as easily.  Questions?

One Webster, located in Chelsea, Massachusetts, is the epitome of luxury apartment living, offering studios, one, and two-bedroom apartment homes. Our community is conveniently situated just minutes from the best dining, shopping and nightlife that Boston has to offer. We are a sister city to Boston, being just ten minutes away, so if you are looking for apartments near Boston, we are a perfect choice!     Centrally Located   One Webster is located between Route 1A and Route 1 North.  We are near the intersection of Eastern Avenue and Webster Avenue, running just off Broadway.  We are centrally located with easy access to all major routes leading to Boston, New Hampshire, Cape Cod, Maine, and the beaches. We are two miles away from the Mystic Mall and the Marina at Admirals Hills is also a short ride away.   Our Walkscore is rated 76, which means most errands can be accomplished on foot and there are many nearby transportation options. The Silver Line 3 is just one block away and within walking distance from One Webster.   The station nearest our Chelsea apartments is the Eastern Avenue Station.    Schools Nearby   Our community is right across the street from Frank M. Sokolowski Elementary School.  There are several other elementary, middle, and high schools in the area. Bunker Hill Community College is within a 15-minute commute.   Community and Apartment Amenities   At One Webster, each of our residents receives VIP treatment with access to our 24-hour fitness center, Wi-Fi lounge, and resort-style pool.  In addition, we have an onsite childcare facility available for families. Our one and two-bedroom floorplan Chelsea apartment homes are fully equipped with every modern convenience, including hardwood floors, sprawling walk-in closets (in select units), gourmet style kitchens, and granite countertops. One Webster, located in Chelsea, Massachusetts, is the epitome of luxury apartment living, offering studios, one, and two-bedroom apartment homes. Our community is conveniently situated just minutes from the best dining, shopping and nightlife that Boston has to offer. We are a sister city to Boston, being just ten minutes away, so if you are looking for apartments near Boston, we are a perfect choice!     Centrally Located   One Webster is located between Route 1A and Route 1 North.  We are near the intersection of Eastern Avenue and Webster Avenue, running just off Broadway.  We are centrally located with easy access to all major routes leading to Boston, New Hampshire, Cape Cod, Maine, and the beaches. We are two miles away from the Mystic Mall and the Marina at Admirals Hills is also a short ride away.   Our Walkscore is rated 76, which means most errands can be accomplished on foot and there are many nearby transportation options. The Silver Line 3 is just one block away and within walking distance from One Webster.   The station nearest our Chelsea apartments is the Eastern Avenue Station.    Schools Nearby   Our community is right across the street from Frank M. Sokolowski Elementary School.  There are several other elementary, middle, and high schools in the area. Bunker Hill Community College is within a 15-minute commute.   Community and Apartment Amenities   At One Webster, each of our residents receives VIP treatment with access to our 24-hour fitness center, Wi-Fi lounge, and resort-style pool.  In addition, we have an onsite childcare facility available for families. Our one and two-bedroom floorplan Chelsea apartment homes are fully equipped with every modern convenience, including hardwood floors, sprawling walk-in closets (in select units), gourmet style kitchens, and granite countertops.   Floorplans   We have studios, one, and two-bedroom apartment homes. The floorplans range in size between 590 square feet and 970 square feet.  The building has a parking garage in which you can reserve a space at an additional monthly fee. We are a sister city to Boston, being just ten minutes away, so if you are looking for apartments near Boston, we are a perfect choice!     Centrally Located   One Webster is located between Route 1A and Route 1 North.  We are near the intersection of Eastern Avenue and Webster Avenue, running just off Broadway.  We are centrally located with easy access to all major routes leading to Boston, New Hampshire, Cape Cod, Maine, and the beaches. We are two miles away from the Mystic Mall and the Marina at Admirals Hills is also a short ride away.   Our Walkscore is rated 76, which means most errands can be accomplished on foot and there are many nearby transportation options. The Silver Line 3 is just one block away and within walking distance from One Webster.   The station nearest our Chelsea apartments is the Eastern Avenue Station.    Schools Nearby   Our community is right across the street from Frank M. Sokolowski Elementary School.  There are several other elementary, middle, and high schools in the area. Bunker Hill Community College is within a 15-minute commute.   Community and Apartment Amenities   At One Webster, each of our residents receives VIP treatment with access to our 24-hour fitness center, Wi-Fi lounge, and resort-style pool.  In addition, we have an onsite childcare facility available for families. Our one and two-bedroom floorplan Chelsea apartment homes are fully equipped with every modern convenience, including hardwood floors, sprawling walk-in closets (in select units), gourmet style kitchens, and granite countertops.   Floorplans   We have studios, one, and two-bedroom apartment homes. The floorplans range in size between 590 square feet and 970 square feet.  The building has a parking garage in which you can reserve a space at an additional monthly fee.
